positive: Stylized symmetrical mandala design featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and mythical floating jellyfish silhouettes. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, suitable for apparel transfer. Use vibrant, neon-electric blues, purples, and magentas against a deep, inky midnight black background. Emphasize clean, sharp lines and strong contrast between the glowing elements and the void background. Style: Abstract Art Deco / Bioluminescence. Aspect: Circular, perfect symmetry. High detail, intricate pattern, vector-graphic quality, screen-printed aesthetic, glowing edges.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyrighted, cartoon, ugly, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, mutation, poorly drawn, out of focus, excess limbs
